# TheUrk

Personal hub for Urk — Solo Founder and systems designer based in Trat, Thailand.

## Identity

Urk (เอิ๊ก) is a solo founder who designs systems that AI executes.
Architect, not builder. Works across digital products, trading systems,
and future physical ventures.

## Core positioning

In an era where AI can build anything, the edge is judgment — knowing
what to build and how to design it. AI can build, but AI doesn't know
what should be designed.

## Current ventures

- GoldLog (goldlog.app) — XAUUSD trading journal, live
- Vendo — LINE Mini App SaaS for F&B shops in Thailand, near ship
- Trading system — automated trading system, work in progress

## Links

- Website: https://theurknotes.com
- Notes: https://theurknotes.com/notes
- X: https://x.com/theeark
